title: DetectionPublishedPayload
description: Payload for DETECTION_PUBLISHED (eventVersion 1, Phase 5, docs/mvp-plan/PRD-Phase-5.md REQ-5.6). Published once per retained (post-filter, post-tracking) detection to aidefense.detections, mission ID as the partition key. label/confidence come from the ONNX Runtime detector adapter; trackId comes from the in-house IoU tracker (docs/adr/ADR-006-detection-model-and-tracker.md). Only civilian/synthetic classes ever appear here — REQ-5.4's allow-list is enforced before this event is ever constructed.

frameIndex.description: 0-based index of the frame this detection was observed on, matching Frame.frameIndex.

frameTimestampMs.description: Milliseconds from the start of the video, derived from frameIndex/fps.

trackId.description: Stable ID assigned by the in-house tracker (ADR-006); persists across consecutive frames for the same object.

label.description: Civilian/synthetic class name, drawn from the REQ-5.4 allow-list only.

confidence.description: Model confidence in [0, 1], already at or above the configurable REQ-5.3 threshold.

boundingBox.description: Pixel-space box in the original (pre-resize) frame; (x, y) is the top-left corner.
